issue.message: Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
This tag is not supported in images generated from this vector icon for API < 24; check generated icon to make sure it looks acceptable
This tag is not supported in images generated from this vector icon for API < 24; check generated icon to make sure it looks acceptable
Very long vector path (16658 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
